content:
One of the most common questions I get from clients is: how do I check my LIC policy status without coming to the office? The answer is four easy ways.

Method 1: LIC Customer Portal. Register at licindia.in with your policy number, date of birth, and mobile number. Log in to view premium payment history, loan eligibility, revival amount, and maturity date.

Method 2: SMS Service. Send an SMS to 9222492224 in the format: ASKLIC STAT followed by your policy number. You will receive current status, outstanding premium, and next due date within minutes.

Method 3: Missed Call Service. Give a missed call to 9222492224 from your registered mobile. LIC will SMS you your policy status automatically. No internet required.

Method 4: WhatsApp. Save 8976862090 to your contacts, then send Hi to initiate. Follow prompts to check policy status, premium due, and loan details.

For any of these to work, your mobile number must be registered with LIC. If not, call me at 9415313434 and I will help you get it updated.

Important: Always verify your premium payment receipts through the portal. I have seen cases where clients assumed premiums were auto-debited but the policy had actually lapsed. A 10-minute check every quarter prevents this.

Use our free [Policy Health Calculator](/calculators/policy-health) to calculate your own numbers.
contentHi:
LIC पॉलिसी स्टेटस जांचने के 4 तरीके:

1. LIC पोर्टल (licindia.in) — पूरी जानकारी
2. SMS: 9222492224 पर ASKLIC STAT <पॉलिसी नंबर>
3. मिस्ड कॉल: 9222492224
4. WhatsApp: 8976862090 पर Hi भेजें

मोबाइल रजिस्टर्ड होना जरूरी। 9415313434 पर कॉल करें अगर मदद चाहिए।
